name: nodeproxy
title: NodeProxy Web Surface Markdown Parser
description: x402-gated MCP server that fetches public URLs, strips scripts/ads/nav, and returns compressed Markdown optimized for LLM token ingestion.

tools.name: surface_markdown_parser
tools.description: Executes fetch on any public URL, strips scripts/ads/nav noise, and returns compressed semantic Markdown optimized for LLM token ingestion.
